greeting.text: Hi love 🌸 Resting today? Your body's doing quiet, important work.
Hello 💗 However today feels, Sakhi's right here with you.

log_prompt.text: Got 10 seconds? A quick check-in helps Sakhi look out for you. 🌸
No pressure — whenever you're ready, your check-in is here. 💗

missed_1.text: No worries about yesterday, love — today's a fresh moment. 🌸
Missed a day? That's okay. Whenever you're ready, we're here. 💗

missed_3plus.text: It's been a few days — completely okay. Come back whenever feels right. 🌸
No pressure at all, love. Sakhi's here whenever you're ready to check back in. 💗

streak_milestone.text: 🌸 Look at your streak — consistency like that deserves real credit.
Even through a tender week, you're showing up. That means a lot. 💗
🌸 A milestone streak during your period? That's real strength.

phase_transition.text: Welcome to your menstrual phase — a good time to rest and be gentle with yourself. 🌸
Your period's here. Sakhi's got extra-soft support for you this week. 💗

greeting.text: Good morning ☀️ Energy's on the rise — what's calling to you today?
Hi there 🌱 Fresh-start energy today. Sakhi's cheering you on.

log_prompt.text: Quick check-in? It only takes a moment and helps build your picture. 🌱
Got a sec to log today? Future-you will thank present-you. ☀️

missed_1.text: You missed yesterday's check-in — pop back in when you can, streak's still warm! 🌱
One day skipped isn't a big deal — let's pick it back up today. ☀️

missed_3plus.text: It's been a few days since your last check-in — let's ease back in together. 🌱
Your streak paused, but it's easy to restart. One check-in gets you going again. ☀️

streak_milestone.text: 🌱 Your streak is growing right along with this phase — amazing work!
Consistency like yours is how real change happens. Keep going! ☀️
🌱 A big streak milestone — your consistency is paying off.

phase_transition.text: You've moved into your follicular phase — energy's building! ☀️
New phase, new energy 🌱 Follicular days are great for fresh starts.

greeting.text: Hey you ✨ You're at your peak energy this week!
Hi love 🌟 Feeling capable today? You've got real momentum.

log_prompt.text: Log today's check-in — you're on a roll! ✨
A quick check-in now keeps your streak (and Sakhi) happy. 🌟

missed_1.text: Yesterday slipped by — no big deal, let's log today and keep the momentum. ✨
Missed a day, but your streak's still warm — jump back in! 🌟

missed_3plus.text: A few days have passed — no judgment, just an easy way back in today. ✨
Life happens! Let's pick your check-ins back up whenever you're ready. 🌟

streak_milestone.text: ✨ Your streak is as strong as you're feeling this week — incredible!
🌟 Look at that streak! You're building something real.
✨ Milestone reached, right at your peak week — perfect timing.

phase_transition.text: You've entered your ovulatory phase — often your highest-energy week! ✨
Ovulation phase has begun 🌟 A great time to lean into what excites you.
Ovulation phase has begun — a key window if you're trying to conceive. 🌟

greeting.text: Hello 🌙 Slowing down is allowed. Sakhi's got you today.
Hi there 💜 However you're feeling, it's valid. Let's ease into today.

log_prompt.text: Whenever you're ready, today's check-in is waiting. No rush. 🌙
A gentle reminder: your check-in helps Sakhi notice patterns for you. 💜

missed_1.text: You missed yesterday — totally okay. A quick log today gets you back on track. 🌙
One skipped day won't undo your progress — let's continue today. 💜

missed_3plus.text: It's been a few quiet days — that's alright. A small step today is enough. 🌙
No need to catch up on everything — just today's check-in is a great start. 💜

streak_milestone.text: 💜 Even while winding down, your streak keeps going. Well done.
🌙 That's real dedication — proud of your progress this cycle.
💜 A milestone streak during a quieter week — that's commitment.

phase_transition.text: You've shifted into your luteal phase — a good time to slow things down. 🌙
Luteal phase has started 💜 Be extra kind to yourself this week.
